scenario_metadata.title: Operation Rising Tide
scenario_metadata.description: 2034 South China Sea conflict between PRC and Vietnam. U.S. forces must manage refugee evacuation and regional stability at U-Tapao AB[cite: 31, 33, 35].

inject_triggers.title: Conflict Escalation
inject_triggers.content: Territorial disagreements between PRC and Vietnam escalate. PRC assets becoming aggressive[cite: 31, 40].

inject_triggers.title: INDOPACOM Briefing
inject_triggers.content: Commander must brief INDOPACOM on airbase status[cite: 49].

inject_triggers.title: Refugee Inflow
inject_triggers.content: First wave of civilian and military aircraft carrying refugees approaching airbase[cite: 39].
